title: Curator File Routed Event
description: folder-curator classified, renamed, enriched, and placed a file at its destination within a curated directory. Emitted after a successful `apply`. ordering_key 'file:<sha256(file_path)>'. Carries the classification so downstream consumers need not re-derive it.

file_path.description: Original absolute path of the incoming file.

destination.description: Directory-relative destination the file was placed at (e.g. 'threads/2026-07-14-damian-sync.md').

category.description: Category folder chosen (e.g. threads, workshop, client_dropbox).

kind.description: Frontmatter kind assigned (e.g. transcript, email, work-product, voice-note).

confidence.description: Classification confidence: one of low, medium, high.

file_hash_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the placed file's contents (ledger key).

updated.description: The file's `updated` freshness timestamp after enrichment.
